title: Day 04 Reflection
description: Solidify useEffect and fetch patterns — you will reuse them every week of this track.

prompts.question: In your own words, why does useEffect exist? What problem would you have fetching in render?
prompts.guidance: Side effects, infinite loops, purity of render.

prompts.question: Walk through your loading → success → error state flow for GitHub search. Which state variables did you use?
prompts.guidance: Name each piece of state and when it changes.

prompts.question: Did you hit an infinite loop or stale data bug? What caused it and how did you fix it?
prompts.guidance: Reference debugging scenarios if you avoided bugs.

prompts.question: What fields did you put on your GitHubUser type? What would you add for a production app?
prompts.guidance: Think optional fields, null handling, runtime validation.
